name: tonylnng--tonic-self-learn
description: Continuous self-improvement through learning from corrections and task self-evaluation. Use when: (1) User corrects the agent (No that is wrong, Actually, I prefer, Stop doing X), (2) After completing any task - evaluate your own output, (3) User asks what the agent has learned, (4) User says remember this or note that. Stores learnings in LanceDB memory + memory/corrections.md for human review.
